regression.command: prateek ko evidence regression assign do

root_cause_audit.issue: NL workflow start — no ACTIVE session despite ML classify success
root_cause_audit.root_cause: Duplicate routing: ML path vs processCommand fallback; not all six workflow intents had processCommand handlers; stale backend masked fixes.
root_cause_audit.fix_applied: Unified startWorkflowIfRegistered(); removed duplicate onboard/create handlers from processCommand; normalizeIntentCommand().
root_cause_audit.why_fix_works: All workflow starts funnel through WorkflowEngineService.startWorkflow → single DB INSERT path.
root_cause_audit.production_risk_remaining: LOW — ConflictException prevents duplicate ACTIVE sessions per phone.

root_cause_audit.issue: Manager /assign webhook error for unknown worker names
root_cause_audit.root_cause: resolveMention threw NotFoundException; bubbled to webhook error instead of user message.
root_cause_audit.fix_applied: not_found mention kind with user-facing message; HttpException <500 returns webhook ok after message.
root_cause_audit.why_fix_works: Expected business failures no longer treated as system failures.
root_cause_audit.production_risk_remaining: LOW — users see actionable feedback for unknown names.

root_cause_audit.fix_applied: Expanded regex for issues, resolve, update, attendance, mgrreject.
root_cause_audit.why_fix_works: Rule-based pre-classify catches operational phrases before embedding classifier.
root_cause_audit.production_risk_remaining: MEDIUM — ML process must be restarted after deploy; novel phrasing may still miss.

root_cause_audit.issue: /update NL parsing ignored task id position
root_cause_audit.fix_applied: resolveUpdateTaskId() and resolveUpdateMessage() for NL word order.
root_cause_audit.why_fix_works: Extracts task id from natural Hindi/English patterns consistently.
root_cause_audit.production_risk_remaining: LOW — edge cases without numeric task id still prompt user.

root_cause_audit.issue: Manager routing ops fail on ineligible task IDs
root_cause_audit.root_cause: assertTaskEligibleForManagerRouting requires AWAITING_MANAGER_ACTION + assigned_to manager — not a code bug.
files_changed: Validation harness only; production eligibility rules unchanged
root_cause_audit.fix_applied: Dynamic routing task setup before mgr golden tests.
root_cause_audit.why_fix_works: Production behaviour is correct; tests must use eligible tasks.
root_cause_audit.production_risk_remaining: LOW — document manager task eligibility for operators.

root_cause_audit.issue: Inventory/vendor/workflow completion failures under stale runtime
root_cause_audit.root_cause: Backend not restarted after code changes; watch mode lag during validation.
files_changed: Operational procedure — restart backend + ML after deploy
root_cause_audit.fix_applied: P0 and evidence audit scripts assert fresh health + DB mutations.
root_cause_audit.why_fix_works: Evidence audit captures row-level mutations not just webhook ok.
root_cause_audit.production_risk_remaining: MEDIUM — deploy runbook must include process restart.

architecture_stability.justification: Unified workflow router validated with 5/5 DB-backed workflow mutations.

workflow_reliability.justification: State transition traces captured for all five Trader OS workflows with COMPLETED sessions and entity rows.

database_reliability.justification: Zero orphan FK rows and zero duplicate ACTIVE sessions in integrity sweep.

task_system_reliability.justification: Some manager operations did not mutate tasks as expected.

scalability_risks.justification: Single ACTIVE session per phone is correct but limits concurrent workflows per user; shared factory DB on remote host adds latency.

data_integrity_risks.justification: FK orphan checks and unique ACTIVE session constraint validated.

operational_risks.justification: Regression 9/9; ML restart required after bot_engine deploy.
